={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: $env.ONBOARDING_SYSTEM, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Date: ' + $('Normalize Input').item.json.today + '

meta.description: Clara Answers Pipeline — Pipeline A (demo->v1) and Pipeline B (onboarding->v2). Trigger with JSON input containing either {transcript, company_name} for Pipeline A or {onboarding_text, account_id} for Pipeline B.
